Compliance.description: No major regulatory violations; registered PTY LTD; minor ARB misleading ad ruling (2025); no FSCA/NCC issues found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed: high app ratings but low Trustpilot (1.7/5) with complaints on products/service; positive Trusted Shops summary.

Product Value.description: Wide range with competitive sales; value good on discounts but quality inconsistencies noted.

Innovation.description: App updates, Fit Finder size tool, AI recommendations, influencer shops; strong digital presence.

Customer Support.description: Email/phone available; mixed reviews - some praise agents, many report ignored escalations, slow refunds.

Accessibility & Security.description: Standard e-commerce security with data encryption in transit and deletion options in app; no explicit POPIA mention found, assumed compliant as active PTY with high traffic.

Innovation.description: AI recommendations, dynamic pricing, 1-hr grocery Takealotnow, iOS/Android apps, seller platform, 3PL logistics.

Customer Support.description: Email/chat channels; app live support; poor HelloPeter/Trustpilot resolution; complex return processes frustrate.

Accessibility & Security.description: App with data collection for personalization; assumes POPIA compliance as major listed entity. Secure payment (credit card, EFT, on-account). No major data breaches reported.
